faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.q1: What is the learning curve like?
faq.a1: We've designed the platform to be intuitive. An expert freelancer can be flying in minutes, and a local business owner will be guided step-by-step by our Injected AI Chat, so the curve is minimal.
faq.a2: Tokens are the currency of intelligence. Requests (like writing an email or analyzing metrics) consume very little. With the Growth plan (4M tokens), you'll have plenty of balance for the daily work of up to 5 active projects throughout the month.
faq.q3: How does context injection (Global Brand Strategy) work?
faq.a3: It's our 'state secret'. You train the AI by uploading your style guides, tone, ideal client, and offers. From there, the AI doesn't start 'from zero' on each prompt, but assumes the perfect identity for your brand.
faq.q4: Can I cancel at any time?
faq.a4: Yes. You own your account. There are no long-term contracts or tricky commitments. You cancel with a couple of clicks and keep using the account until the end of the monthly billing cycle.

upgrade.title: Outreach Automation
upgrade.desc: Turn cold contacts into warm conversations — automatically. Send from your own Gmail, track every interaction, and close deals while you sleep.
features: Email scheduling with optimal send-time intelligence
Email open & click tracking with pixel-based technology
Spintax engine for unique, spam-resistant messages
Multi-step email sequences with auto-stop on reply
Multichannel sequences: email, LinkedIn, calls & tasks
Unified reply inbox (Unibox) across all mailboxes
B2B lead database & email finder integration
Campaign analytics with open, click, and reply rates
upgrade.footer: Cancel anytime · Instant access · Billed monthly

queue.title: Sequence Queue Monitor
queue.subtitle: Real-time visibility into upcoming sequence steps scheduled in BullMQ.
queue.emptyDesc: No emails are currently scheduled to be sent. New jobs will appear here as soon as contacts are enrolled in active sequences.
queue.purgeOrphansConfirm: Are you sure you want to clear orphan jobs? This will remove all jobs for sequences or contacts that no longer exist.
queue.noResultsDesc: No sends were found matching these filters. Try adjusting your search or clearing filters.
queue.retryAllConfirm: Are you sure you want to retry ALL failed jobs? This will move them back to the active queue.
queue.idNotFound: Could not identify sequence or job ID
queue.ghostConfirm: Are you SURE you want to delete this "Ghost" send (ID: {{jobId}})?
queue.sequenceConfirm: Are you SURE you want to delete ALL pending sends for the sequence "{{sequenceName}}"? This will clear the BullMQ queue for this sequence regardless of its status in the database.
queue.rebalanceConfirm: Warning: This will strictly reschedule all upcoming sends relative to NOW and space them out by your project's sending interval. This is useful for fixing 'clumped' legacy jobs or unassigned contacts. Proceed?
queue.purgeConfirm: This action will permanently delete all BullMQ jobs and enrollment records linked to sequences that no longer exist in the database. Do you wish to continue?
